title: antennaria neglecta var. neodioica
intro: Antennaria neglecta var. neodioica, also known as Mountain Silverweed, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Antennaria genus, a group of flowering plants in the Asteraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The medicinal properties of Mountain Silverweed have been reported to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Mountain Silverweed include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
